name: HomeTeam Inspection Service
description: Comprehensive mold inspection services using state-of-the-art technology to identify mold issues in Wilmington, NC homes.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Very thorough, the inspector was very knowledgeable and trustworthy. They also followed up with calls
Great communication from start to finish. Josh is very knowledgeable and follows through to ensure everything is done satisfactorily.
Very professional. Explanation of what he found is superb. Would highly recommend to all.
I was very impressed to be able to speak with the owner upon first phone call. Great company!

sentiment.summary: HomeTeam Inspection Service has an excellent reputation built on thorough inspections, knowledgeable inspectors, outstanding communication, and detailed explanations that consistently exceed customer expectations.
